key_items: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while analyst calls it a contrarian indicator
CFTC approves Coinbase and regulated exchanges to offer Bitcoin perpetual futures, expanding institutional access
Bitcoin enters buy zone that previously led to 660% and 1,700% rallies according on-chain analysis
reasoning: Mixed signals dominate the near-term outlook: significant ETF outflows and negative retail sentiment are offset by expanding regulatory clarity (CFTC perps approval) and technical buy zone signals that historically preceded major rallies. The contrarian nature of record outflows alongside institutional framework improvements suggests consolidation rather than directional conviction over the 1-7 day window.
risks: Large-scale ETF outflows coupled with retail sentiment weakness could accelerate downward momentum if Bitcoin fails to hold key technical support levels, particularly below the $61,000 200-week moving average.
